q: What is the function of the power supply?
a: to convert AC power into a lower voltage DC power

q: Which two motherboard components connect to the Northbridge chipset? (Choose two.)
Refer to the exhibit. To what input device would the cables attach?
Which three safety guidelines would be recommended for a technician working inside a laser printer? (Choose three.)
a: Allow the hot area of the laser printer to cool.; Remove jewelry and other accessories.; Secure loose clothing.

q: Match the cloud model with the description.
a: public cloud:uses Internet to provide services;hybrid cloud:consists of two or more types of clouds;community cloud:customized for functional needs;private cloud:available to a single specific organization
